query: I need to build a really good prompt for generating weekly status reports. The current one I'm using with ChatGPT is giving me generic results and I want something structured that actually works consistently.

aiutami a scrivere un prompt per creare email di outreach a freddo. Devo contattare CTO di aziende SaaS per il nostro tool di API monitoring, e voglio che il prompt produca email che non sembrino spam
I want to design a structured prompt that I can reuse across my team for writing technical RFCs. We keep getting inconsistent quality and I think a well-crafted prompt template would solve this.

prompt engineering help - I have a reference document that I love (it's a competitor's landing page copy) and I want to reverse-engineer the patterns from it to create my own prompt for generating similar copy for our product pages
crea un prompt strutturato per generare documentazione API partendo dalle spec OpenAPI. Deve produrre docs che permettano agli sviluppatori di integrarsi in meno di 30 minuti

I need a prompt builder for my content team. They need to generate blog posts about DevOps topics but every time they use AI the output sounds generic and corporate. I want to craft a prompt with clear rules about tone and audience.

can you help me create a prompt? I'm trying to get Claude to write investor update emails for our Series A startup. I have a great example from a YC founder that I want to use as reference, and I have specific rules about what we never include (runway numbers, specific customer names without permission)

build a prompt for generating QBR (quarterly business review) presentations. The audience is the board of directors, they want data not fluff, and the output should follow our company template which I can share
voglio un prompt per scrivere le descrizioni dei prodotti nel nostro e-commerce. Ho già un file con le linee guida del brand e un esempio di descrizione perfetta da usare come reference
write me a prompt template that I can use to generate consistent code review feedback. I want it to follow a specific structure: summary, critical issues, suggestions, and praise. Quick mode is fine.
I need to write a Python script that reads a CSV file and generates a summary report. The CSV has columns: date, revenue, costs, and region. Can you help me write the code?
review my pull request - I changed the authentication middleware to use JWT tokens instead of session cookies. Here's the diff. Let me know if there are any security concerns.
write a README for my open source library. It's a Node.js rate limiter that uses Redis. Include installation, basic usage, API reference, and contributing guidelines.
I need to write unit tests for my Fastify route handlers. I'm using node-tap and I want to test the /users endpoint with various scenarios including auth failures and validation errors.
help me write a commit message for these changes. I refactored the database connection pooling to use a singleton pattern and added retry logic with exponential backoff
can you explain how async/await works in JavaScript? I'm confused about error handling with try/catch vs .catch() and when to use Promise.all vs Promise.allSettled

I need to write an email to my manager explaining why we should migrate from MongoDB to PostgreSQL. Can you draft it for me? Keep it under 200 words and focus on the cost savings and query performance benefits.
set up a new Fastify project with TypeScript, env-schema for config, and autoload for plugins and routes. Use the standard project structure with src/plugins and src/routes.

I'm getting a TypeScript error: 'Property decorators does not exist on type FastifyInstance'. I'm trying to add a custom decorator to my Fastify instance but the types aren't working. Here's my code...
pianifica l'implementazione di un sistema di autenticazione con OAuth2 per la nostra API. Dobbiamo supportare Google e GitHub come provider e gestire il refresh dei token.
